# Open MindMap

> A beautiful, zero-dependency, interactive mind map component for React. Natively supports AI stream output with Markdown list syntax and iOS-style UI. Pure SVG rendering, plugin system, dark mode, keyboard-first, and mobile optimized.

- npm: [@xiangfa/mindmap](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@xiangfa/mindmap)
- GitHub: [u14app/mindmap](https://github.com/u14app/mindmap)
- License: Apache-2.0
- React: >= 18

## Installation

```bash
npm install @xiangfa/mindmap
```

Optional (for LaTeX math rendering):
```bash
npm install katex
```

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { MindMap } from "@xiangfa/mindmap";
import "@xiangfa/mindmap/style.css";

const markdown = `
My Mind Map
  - First Topic
    - Subtopic A
    - Subtopic B
  - Second Topic
`;

function App() {
  return <MindMap markdown={markdown} />;
}
```

The component fills its parent container. Ensure the parent has explicit dimensions (width and height).

## Core Concepts

- **Markdown input**: Pass a markdown list string via the `markdown` prop. Indent with 2 spaces per level. Lines without leading `-` become root nodes. Blank lines separate multiple root trees.
- **Data input**: Alternatively pass structured `MindMapData` objects via the `data` prop.
- **AI streaming**: The component natively renders mind maps from streaming markdown. Feed tokens as they arrive from an LLM.
- **Built-in AI generation**: Set the `ai` prop with an OpenAI-compatible endpoint to enable a natural language input bar. Supports text, image, and PDF attachments.
- **Pure SVG**: All rendering uses SVG elements. No canvas, no external layout engines. Sharp at any zoom level.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| data | MindMapData \| MindMapData[] | required | Tree data |
| markdown | string | - | Markdown list (overrides data) |
| defaultDirection | 'left' \| 'right' \| 'both' | 'both' | Layout direction |
| theme | 'light' \| 'dark' \| 'auto' | 'auto' | Color theme |
| locale | string | auto | UI language |
| messages | Partial\<MindMapMessages\> | - | Override UI strings |
| readonly | boolean | false | Display-only mode |
| toolbar | boolean \| ToolbarConfig | true | Show/hide controls |
| ai | MindMapAIConfig | - | AI generation config |
| plugins | MindMapPlugin[] | allPlugins | Plugins to enable |
| textEditor | ComponentType | - | Pass MindMapTextEditor for text editing |
| onDataChange | (data: MindMapData[]) => void | - | Change callback |

## Ref Methods

Access via `useRef<MindMapRef>`:

- `exportToSVG()` — returns SVG string
- `exportToPNG()` — returns Promise\<Blob\> (high-DPI PNG)
- `exportToOutline()` — returns markdown list string
- `getData()` / `setData(data)` — get/set tree data
- `setMarkdown(md)` — parse markdown and replace tree
- `fitView()` — reset zoom to fit all nodes
- `setDirection(dir)` — change layout direction

## Lightweight Viewer

For read-only use cases where bundle size matters:

```tsx
import { MindMapViewer } from "@xiangfa/mindmap/viewer";
import "@xiangfa/mindmap/style.css";

<MindMapViewer markdown={markdown} />;
```

~48% smaller bundle. Supports themes, plugins, pan/zoom, fold toggle. No editing, drag-drop, AI, context menu, or export.

## Plugin System

7 built-in plugins (all enabled by default): frontmatter, dotted-line, folding, multi-line, tags, cross-link, latex.

```tsx
import { MindMap, foldingPlugin, tagsPlugin } from "@xiangfa/mindmap";
<MindMap data={data} plugins={[foldingPlugin, tagsPlugin]} />;
```

Plugins extend ~20 hook points across parsing, serialization, layout, rendering, and export. See `MindMapPlugin` interface.

## Extended Syntax

- **Inline formatting**: `**bold**`, `*italic*`, `` `code` ``, `~~strikethrough~~`, `==highlight==`, `[link](url)`, `![alt](path)`
- **Task status**: `[x]` done, `[ ]` todo, `[-]` in-progress
- **Remarks**: `> remark text` under a node
- **Comments**: `%% comment` (not rendered)
- **Frontmatter** (plugin): YAML block with `direction` and `theme`
- **Dotted lines** (plugin): `-.` instead of `-`
- **Folding** (plugin): `+` instead of `-` for initially collapsed
- **Multi-line** (plugin): `|` continuation lines
- **Tags** (plugin): `#tag` at end of node text
- **Cross-links** (plugin): `{#anchor}` and `-> {#target}`
- **LaTeX** (plugin): `$...$` inline, `$$...$$` display (requires KaTeX)

## Data Structure

```ts
interface MindMapData {
  id: string;
  text: string;
  children?: MindMapData[];
  remark?: string;
  taskStatus?: "todo" | "doing" | "done";
  dottedLine?: boolean;
  multiLineContent?: string[];
  tags?: string[];
  anchorId?: string;
  crossLinks?: CrossLink[];
  collapsed?: boolean;
}
```

## Custom Styling

Override CSS custom properties on `.mindmap-container`:

- Canvas: `--mindmap-canvas-bg`
- Root node: `--mindmap-root-bg`, `--mindmap-root-text`, `--mindmap-root-font-size`, `--mindmap-root-font-weight`, `--mindmap-root-font-family`
- Child nodes: `--mindmap-node-text`, `--mindmap-node-font-size`, `--mindmap-node-font-weight`, `--mindmap-node-font-family`
- Edges: `--mindmap-edge-width`
- Branch colors: `--mindmap-branch-0` through `--mindmap-branch-9`
- 30+ CSS variables available. See docs/Custom Styling.md for full list.

## Utility Exports

```ts
import {
  parseMarkdownList, toMarkdownList,
  parseMarkdownMultiRoot, toMarkdownMultiRoot,
  parseInlineMarkdown, stripInlineMarkdown,
  buildExportSVG, exportToPNG,
  resolveMessages, detectLocale,
  allPlugins, MindMapTextEditor, MindMapViewer,
} from "@xiangfa/mindmap";
```
